basic_details.job_title: NIT Andhra Pradesh Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Andhra Pradesh
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Andhra Pradesh (NIT Andhra Pradesh) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of NIT Andhra Pradesh. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Andhra Pradesh Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation shall be relaxed for exceptional candidates.

qualification.details: Any one of the following: M.E./M.Tech. in Chemical Engineering/Chemical Technology/Biochemical Engineering/Nanotechnology/Petrochemical Engineering/Environmental Science/Bioprocess Engineering, or any allied branch with/without valid GATE score (min 60% UR/EWS/OBC-NCL or 55% SC/ST/PwD); M.Sc. in Chemistry with/without GATE/NET (min 60%/55%); B.E./B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering or allied from Central Institutes/Universities with min CGPA 7.5

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 30000/- + HRA - Rs. 42000/- + HRA Per Month
salary_details.details: Rs. 30000/- + HRA - Rs. 42000/- + HRA Per Month

selection_process: Shortlisting based on application Interview (offline/online) Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Andhra Pradesh Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at NIT Andhra Pradesh?
faq.answer: The last date for receiving applications via email is 20th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have an M.E./M.Tech. in specific engineering or science branches, or an M.Sc. in Chemistry, or a B.E./B.Tech. from Central Institutes/Universities with a minimum CGPA.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the JRF position is 35 years. Age relaxation may be provided for exceptional candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The salary offered ranges from Rs. 30,000/- + HRA to Rs. 42,000/- + HRA per month, depending on qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the NIT Andhra Pradesh JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates must apply via email with their complete bio-data and self-attested documents before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for any category of candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of applications, followed by an interview (offline or online) and document verification.

faq.question: Q8. Which department is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the National Institute of Technology Andhra Pradesh (NIT Andhra Pradesh).

faq.question: Q9. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section on this page by clicking the provided link.
